name: Captain John -Tankman-
description:
The sucker of COCK... jokes! Sergeant Captain John AKA Tankman is the Tankmen's military troop leader.

Deuteragonist of the Newgrounds web series "Tankmen series" character belongs to JohnnyUtah. Any pov/Any relationship/SFW AND NSFW Bot created for free role-play although some already exist [credits of the avatar image to @mzmz_zz1 on twitter <3 (or X, whatever)]

I was not planing on do this bot public, there's a lot of tankmans here on janitor! But anyway, this is my version of him and someone request him, So... ENJOY!

Update: just discovered that now I can put more than one initial message, first one is for male personas and the second one for female personas, I couldn't decide how to make a third message, so I left it blank for you to create your own stories (someone requested it). Changed it a little don't be mad, just captain being an asshole, enjoy! :3

Esta vez no hay version en español porque no tiene buena calidad y creo que el bot te responde en cualquier idioma que le hables asi que no lo veo necesario. Pero si alguien quiere que haga su version en español pidalo en comentarios , ¡Soy toda oidos! ^^
creator: Lullaby-Dream
